thesis_profile.market_mechanism: v100 (Roadmap Phase 2d): v97 baseline (xs_minimal_v12_score = v94 + stress_liq_conc_iv with v94 hand-tuned weights + DVOL multiplier overlay m7) + drawdown-conditional throttle. New layer: execution_backtest's main backtest loop maintains a running equity curve across periods; before each period's decision computes 30-day rolling drawdown vs recent peak and scales target positions accordingly: DD > 10% -> all positions x0.0 (full exit, re-arm only after DD recovers below 5%); DD > 5% -> all positions x0.5 (half-size). Multiplier overlay (DVOL m7) applied first at portfolio sizing layer; DD throttle multiplier applied second. Both BEFORE turnover scaling. Stateful (depends on running portfolio equity), so passed via external_throttle_multiplier kwarg to _cross_sectional_period rather than via the multiplier_overlay registry which is stateless lookup. Addresses v97 max_drawdown 24.7% (target 12% per Phase 2 spec).
thesis_profile.directional_claim: rank top-3 liquid perp-covered names by xs_minimal_v12_score, scale by DVOL multiplier overlay m7, AND scale further by drawdown-conditional throttle (DD>5%=x0.5, DD>10%=x0.0 over 30-day rolling window). Expected: rank IC unchanged ~0.187 (DD throttle is portfolio-level multiplier, doesn't reshape ranking), WF median sharpe similar to v97 0.954 (DD throttle saves losses in drawdown periods but caps upside in recovery periods; net effect uncertain), worst regime sharpe possibly improved beyond v97 -2.486 (DD throttle directly addresses tail; primary value), max drawdown reduced from v97 24.7% toward Phase 2 target 12%, net return possibly improved toward Phase 2 target positive (DD throttle prevents catastrophic loss compounding). Falsification triggers v100 rejection if WF median sharpe < 0.85 (DD throttle hurt rather than helped) OR worst regime sharpe < -2.9 OR max drawdown > 35% (DD throttle ineffective).
thesis_profile.factor_formula: raw = -0.20*z(iv_smooth_20) -0.10*z(rv_5) +0.11*z(dh_60) +0.10*z(dh_5) +0.13*z(dh_20) -0.07*z(tt_smooth_5) -0.10*z(liquidity_stress_qv_iv) -0.06*z(momentum_decay_5_20) +0.05*z(taker_imb_dispersion) -0.05*z(quality_funding_oi) -0.11*z(stress_liq_conc_iv); final = tanh((percentile_rank(raw)-0.5)*1.80); position_multiplier_overlay = clip(1 - tanh((max(btc_dvol_z90, eth_dvol_z90) - 0.5) * 3), 0.2, 1.0); drawdown_throttle = 1.0 if running_dd_30d <= 5%, 0.5 if 5% < dd <= 10%, 0.0 if dd > 10%. Final_position = score * overlay * dd_throttle (all applied at portfolio sizing layer)
